body: As advertised in the title. We are updating to breaking releases from CLIMAParameters v0.9 and Thermodynamics v0.12, and doing our own breaking release.
title: Update to CLIMAParameters v0.9 and Thermodynamics v0.12

title: adding activity based dep to parcel

body:
Adding a simple ODE solver to exercise the P3 scheme functions in a 0-dimensional setup. 

This is meant to help with the development and testing of the P3 scheme
title: Add sandbox for testing P3 scheme
